hero.title: SSVID - Cut Video YouTube Online
hero.subtitle: Free, fast & unlimited YouTube MP4 & MP3 Cutter

howTo.title: How to Cut & Trim YouTube Videos Online

steps.title: Copy the Video Link
steps.description: Copy the YouTube video URL you want to cut or trim.

steps.title: Paste the URL
steps.description: Paste the YouTube link into the SSVID cutter tool.

steps.title: Select Start & End Time
steps.description: Choose the exact start and end time to trim the video segment.

steps.title: Download MP4 or MP3
steps.description: Click Cut & Download to export the trimmed file in MP4 video or MP3 audio format.

intro.title: What Is SSVID YouTube Video Cutter?
intro.description: SSVID is a FREE YouTube Video Cutter that lets you cut, trim and download YouTube videos instantly. Instead of downloading the entire video file, you can select a specific segment and export it as MP4 or MP3. The tool works online in your browser with NO ADS and NO LIMITS.

columns.title: Cut Video YouTube Online in Seconds
columns.description:
1. Paste your YouTube video link.
2. Choose MP4 or MP3 format.
3. Set the start and end time.
4. Download the trimmed file instantly.

columns.title: MP4 & MP3 Cutter for Mobile and Desktop
columns.description: SSVID works perfectly on mobile phones, tablets and desktop computers. You can cut YouTube videos online without installing any software. Download trimmed MP4 videos or extract MP3 audio directly from your browser.

whyDownload.title: Why Use SSVID to Cut & Trim YouTube Videos?
whyDownload.description: With SSVID, you save time and storage by downloading only the part you need. Whether you want highlights, short clips, music segments, or podcast excerpts, this online YouTube cutter makes it fast and simple.

quality.title: High Quality MP4 & MP3 Export
quality.description: SSVID preserves original video and audio quality. Export trimmed segments in high-quality MP4 video or clear MP3 audio with fast processing speed and smooth playback.

comparison.title: YouTube Cutter vs YouTube Multi Download

sections.title: Cut & Trim YouTube Video
sections.description: Best when you need a specific part of a single YouTube video. Select the exact time range and download only that segment.

sections.title: YouTube Multi Download
sections.description: If you want to download multiple full YouTube videos at once instead of trimming, use the Multi Download tool. It supports both MP3 and MP4 formats for batch downloads.

useCases.title: When Should You Use SSVID YouTube Cutter?

items.title: Create Short Clips & Highlights
items.description: Cut key moments from long YouTube videos for sharing or editing.

items.title: Extract Music or Podcast Segments
items.description: Trim and convert specific parts of music videos or podcasts into MP3 files.

items.title: Download Only What You Need
items.description: Avoid downloading full-length videos by selecting and saving only the important segment.

items.question: Is SSVID YouTube cutter free?
items.answer: Yes. SSVID is completely FREE with NO ADS and NO LIMITS.

items.question: Can I cut YouTube videos to MP3?
items.answer: Yes. You can trim a YouTube video and export the selected segment as MP3 audio.

items.question: Do I need to install software?
items.answer: No installation is required. SSVID works fully online in your browser.

items.question: Does SSVID support mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes. The YouTube cutter works on mobile phones, tablets and desktop computers.

items.question: Will the video quality be reduced after cutting?
items.answer: No. SSVID maintains the original quality of the selected video segment.
